### Реконструкция CSSA + ESPRIT

```{r, include=FALSE}
setup_candidates <- c(
  "00_setup.Rmd",
  file.path("cssa esprit", "00_setup.Rmd")
)
if (!exists("cssa_esprit_setup_loaded", inherits = FALSE)) {
  setup_file <- setup_candidates[file.exists(setup_candidates)][1L]
  if (is.na(setup_file)) {
    stop("Cannot find 00_setup.Rmd")
  }
  setup_code <- tempfile(fileext = ".R")
  knitr::purl(setup_file, output = setup_code, quiet = TRUE)
  source(setup_code, local = knitr::knit_global())
}
```

```{r, include=FALSE}
cssa_one_row_case <- function(signal_ind, noise_matrix, num_components = 1L) {
  clean <- matrix(0, nrow = 1L, ncol = ncol(noise_matrix))
  clean[1L, signal_ind] <- 1

  est <- (clean + noise_matrix) |>
    dft() |>
    cssa.row(num.line = num_components) |>
    idft.row() |>
    Re() |>
    as.numeric()

  list(signal_ind = signal_ind, est = est)
}

smear_summary <- function(case, radius = 2L, threshold = 0) {
  x <- pmax(case$est, 0)
  x[x <= threshold] <- 0

  signal_ind <- case$signal_ind
  near_idx <- max(1L, signal_ind - radius):min(length(x), signal_ind + radius)
  total_mass <- sum(x)
  near_mass <- sum(x[near_idx])

  data.frame(
    signal_ind = signal_ind,
    max_ind = which.max(x),
    signal_value = case$est[signal_ind],
    max_value = max(case$est),
    near_mass_share = near_mass / total_mass,
    side_mass_share = (near_mass - x[signal_ind]) / total_mass,
    outside_mass_share = (total_mass - near_mass) / total_mass,
    smear_score = 1 - near_mass / total_mass,
    positive_count = sum(x > 0)
  )
}

find_smear_extremes <- function(noise_matrix,
                                search_idx = 5:(ncol(noise_matrix) - 5),
                                radius = 2L,
                                threshold = 0,
                                case_fun = cssa_one_row_case,
                                ...) {
  cases <- lapply(search_idx, case_fun, noise_matrix = noise_matrix, ...)
  names(cases) <- as.character(search_idx)

  diagnostics <- do.call(
    rbind,
    lapply(cases, smear_summary, radius = radius, threshold = threshold)
  )
  rownames(diagnostics) <- NULL

  diagnostics <- subset(
    diagnostics,
    max_ind == signal_ind & is.finite(smear_score)
  )
  if (nrow(diagnostics) == 0L) {
    stop("No finite smear diagnostics with max_ind == signal_ind.")
  }
  diagnostics <- diagnostics[order(diagnostics$smear_score), ]

  min_row <- diagnostics[1L, ]
  max_row <- diagnostics[nrow(diagnostics), ]

  list(
    min = list(summary = min_row, case = cases[[as.character(min_row$signal_ind)]]),
    max = list(summary = max_row, case = cases[[as.character(max_row$signal_ind)]]),
    diagnostics = diagnostics,
    cases = cases
  )
}

smear_columns <- c(
  "signal_ind",
  "max_ind",
  "signal_value",
  "max_value",
  "near_mass_share",
  "side_mass_share",
  "outside_mass_share",
  "smear_score",
  "positive_count"
)

smear_three_point_summary <- function(extremes) {
  mid_idx <- ceiling(nrow(extremes$diagnostics) / 2)
  out <- rbind(
    minimum = extremes$min$summary,
    median = extremes$diagnostics[mid_idx, ],
    maximum = extremes$max$summary
  )[, smear_columns]
  data.frame(case = rownames(out), out, row.names = NULL)
}

plot_smear_case <- function(case_obj, summary_row, main_prefix) {
  signal_ind <- case_obj$signal_ind
  plot(
    case_obj$est,
    type = "h",
    lwd = 2,
    col = "grey20",
    xlab = "Index",
    ylab = "Intensity",
    main = sprintf(
      "%s: index %d, smear = %.3f",
      main_prefix,
      signal_ind,
      summary_row$smear_score
    )
  )
  abline(v = signal_ind, col = "firebrick", lty = 2)
  legend(
    "topright",
    legend = c("reconstruction", "true pixel"),
    col = c("grey20", "firebrick"),
    lty = c(1, 2),
    lwd = c(2, 1),
    bty = "n"
  )
}

esprit_project_cssa <- function(x,
                                L = (length(x) + 1L) %/% 2L,
                                num_components = 1L,
                                correct_frequency = FALSE) {
  x <- as.vector(x)
  N <- length(x)
  fit <- Rssa::ssa(x, L = L, kind = "cssa", svd.method = "svd")
  decomposition <- get("decomposition", attr(fit, ".env"))
  num_components <- as.integer(num_components)[1L]
  num_components <- max(1L, min(num_components, ncol(decomposition$U)))

  esprit_res <- Rssa::parestimate(
    fit,
    groups = list(signal = seq_len(num_components)),
    method = "esprit",
    normalize.roots = FALSE
  )
  num_components <- min(
    num_components,
    length(esprit_res$roots),
    length(esprit_res$frequencies)
  )

  omega <- esprit_res$frequencies[seq_len(num_components)]
  if (correct_frequency) {
    omega <- round(omega * N) / N
  }
  # ESPRIT root moduli are discarded; projection uses only the estimated phases.
  omega <- unique(omega)
  num_components <- length(omega)
  mu <- exp(2 * pi * omega * 1i)

  basis <- outer(0:(N - 1L), mu, function(i, z) z ^ i)
  amplitudes <- as.vector(qr.solve(basis, x))

  as.vector(basis %*% amplitudes)
}

classic_esprit_cssa <- function(x, L = (length(x) + 1L) %/% 2L, num_components = 1L) {
  esprit_project_cssa(
    x,
    L = L,
    num_components = num_components,
    correct_frequency = FALSE
  )
}

new_cssa <- function(x, L = (length(x) + 1L) %/% 2L, num_components = 1L) {
  esprit_project_cssa(
    x,
    L = L,
    num_components = num_components,
    correct_frequency = TRUE
  )
}

raw_esprit_cssa <- classic_esprit_cssa

esprit_cssa_denoise <- function(m,
                                L = (ncol(as.matrix(m)) + 1L) %/% 2L,
                                num_components = 1L,
                                correct_frequency = FALSE,
                                clip = TRUE) {
  m <- as.matrix(m)
  z <- dft(m)
  z_hat <- t(apply(
    z,
    1L,
    esprit_project_cssa,
    L = L,
    num_components = num_components,
    correct_frequency = correct_frequency
  ))
  out <- Re(idft.row(z_hat))

  if (clip) clip01(out) else out
}

raw_esprit_cssa_denoise <- function(m,
                                    L = (ncol(as.matrix(m)) + 1L) %/% 2L,
                                    num_components = 1L,
                                    clip = TRUE) {
  esprit_cssa_denoise(
    m,
    L = L,
    num_components = num_components,
    correct_frequency = FALSE,
    clip = clip
  )
}

new_cssa_denoise <- function(m,
                             L = (ncol(as.matrix(m)) + 1L) %/% 2L,
                             num_components = 1L,
                             clip = TRUE) {
  esprit_cssa_denoise(
    m,
    L = L,
    num_components = num_components,
    correct_frequency = TRUE,
    clip = clip
  )
}

esprit_one_row_case <- function(signal_ind,
                                noise_matrix,
                                L = (ncol(noise_matrix) + 1L) %/% 2L,
                                num_components = 1L,
                                correct_frequency = FALSE) {
  clean <- matrix(0, nrow = 1L, ncol = ncol(noise_matrix))
  clean[1L, signal_ind] <- 1

  est <- esprit_cssa_denoise(
    clean + noise_matrix,
    L = L,
    num_components = num_components,
    correct_frequency = correct_frequency,
    clip = FALSE
  ) |>
    as.numeric()

  list(signal_ind = signal_ind, est = est)
}

raw_esprit_cssa_one_row_case <- function(signal_ind,
                                         noise_matrix,
                                         L = (ncol(noise_matrix) + 1L) %/% 2L,
                                         num_components = 1L) {
  esprit_one_row_case(
    signal_ind,
    noise_matrix = noise_matrix,
    L = L,
    num_components = num_components,
    correct_frequency = FALSE
  )
}

new_cssa_one_row_case <- function(signal_ind,
                                  noise_matrix,
                                  L = (ncol(noise_matrix) + 1L) %/% 2L,
                                  num_components = 1L) {
  esprit_one_row_case(
    signal_ind,
    noise_matrix = noise_matrix,
    L = L,
    num_components = num_components,
    correct_frequency = TRUE
  )
}

common_median_smear_index <- function(smear_comparisons) {
  common_idx <- Reduce(
    intersect,
    lapply(smear_comparisons, function(x) x$diagnostics$signal_ind)
  )
  if (length(common_idx) == 0L) {
    stop("No common smear index with matching maximum for all methods.")
  }

  base_diagnostics <- smear_comparisons[[1L]]$diagnostics
  base_diagnostics <- base_diagnostics[base_diagnostics$signal_ind %in% common_idx, ]
  base_diagnostics$signal_ind[ceiling(nrow(base_diagnostics) / 2)]
}

plain_cssa_binary <- function(m, threshold = 0.1, num_components = 1L) {
  denoised <- cssa_denoise(
    m,
    num_of_lines = num_components,
    method = "row.row",
    clip = TRUE
  )

  list(
    denoised = denoised,
    binary = ifelse(denoised >= threshold, 1, 0)
  )
}

new_cssa_binary <- function(m,
                            threshold = 0.1,
                            L = (ncol(as.matrix(m)) + 1L) %/% 2L,
                            num_components = 1L,
                            clip = TRUE) {
  denoised <- new_cssa_denoise(
    m,
    L = L,
    num_components = num_components,
    clip = clip
  )

  list(
    denoised = denoised,
    binary = ifelse(denoised >= threshold, 1, 0)
  )
}

reconstruction_preprocess_binary <- function(m,
                                             method,
                                             threshold = 0.1,
                                             num_components = 1L) {
  switch(
    method,
    cssa = plain_cssa_binary(
      m,
      threshold = threshold,
      num_components = num_components
    ),
    classic_esprit = {
      denoised <- raw_esprit_cssa_denoise(
        m,
        num_components = num_components,
        clip = TRUE
      )
      list(denoised = denoised, binary = ifelse(denoised >= threshold, 1, 0))
    },
    corrected_esprit = {
      denoised <- new_cssa_denoise(
        m,
        num_components = num_components,
        clip = TRUE
      )
      list(denoised = denoised, binary = ifelse(denoised >= threshold, 1, 0))
    },
    stop("Unknown reconstruction method: ", method)
  )
}

reconstruction_ht_error_once <- function(method,
                                         label,
                                         noisy,
                                         a = 2,
                                         b = -1,
                                         threshold = 0.1,
                                         num_components = 1L,
                                         rho_step = 1,
                                         theta_step = 0.01) {
  processed <- reconstruction_preprocess_binary(
    noisy,
    method = method,
    threshold = threshold,
    num_components = num_components
  )

  ht <- make_accumulator(
    processed$binary,
    detector = function(m) m,
    rho_step = rho_step,
    theta_step = theta_step
  )

  true_line <- convert_ab_to_rho_theta(a, b)
  pred_line <- find_k_max(ht$accumulator, 1L, ht$rho, ht$theta)[1L, ]
  err <- line_parameter_error(true_line, pred_line)

  data.frame(
    method = label,
    pred_rho = unname(pred_line["rho"]),
    pred_theta = unname(pred_line["theta"]),
    rho_mse = unname(err["rho_mse"]),
    theta_mse = unname(err["theta_mse"]),
    active_pixels = sum(processed$binary > 0),
    row.names = NULL
  )
}
```

```{r}
set.seed(1111)

comparison_n <- 100L
comparison_sigma <- 0.2
comparison_noise_matrix <- add.noise(
  matrix(0, nrow = 1L, ncol = comparison_n),
  sigma = comparison_sigma
)
comparison_search_idx <- 5:(comparison_n - 5)
comparison_radius <- 2L
comparison_threshold <- 0
comparison_num_components <- 1L

cssa_smear_comparison <- find_smear_extremes(
  noise_matrix = comparison_noise_matrix,
  search_idx = comparison_search_idx,
  radius = comparison_radius,
  threshold = comparison_threshold,
  case_fun = cssa_one_row_case,
  num_components = comparison_num_components
)

classic_esprit_smear_comparison <- find_smear_extremes(
  noise_matrix = comparison_noise_matrix,
  search_idx = comparison_search_idx,
  radius = comparison_radius,
  threshold = comparison_threshold,
  case_fun = raw_esprit_cssa_one_row_case,
  num_components = comparison_num_components
)

corrected_esprit_smear_comparison <- find_smear_extremes(
  noise_matrix = comparison_noise_matrix,
  search_idx = comparison_search_idx,
  radius = comparison_radius,
  threshold = comparison_threshold,
  case_fun = new_cssa_one_row_case,
  num_components = comparison_num_components
)

smear_comparisons <- list(
  "Basic CSSA" = cssa_smear_comparison,
  "CSSA + ESPRIT (no correction)" = classic_esprit_smear_comparison,
  "CSSA + ESPRIT (corrected)" = corrected_esprit_smear_comparison
)

median_signal_index <- common_median_smear_index(smear_comparisons)

median_cases <- list(
  "Basic CSSA" = cssa_one_row_case(
    median_signal_index,
    noise_matrix = comparison_noise_matrix,
    num_components = comparison_num_components
  ),
  "CSSA + ESPRIT (no correction)" = raw_esprit_cssa_one_row_case(
    median_signal_index,
    noise_matrix = comparison_noise_matrix,
    num_components = comparison_num_components
  ),
  "CSSA + ESPRIT (corrected)" = new_cssa_one_row_case(
    median_signal_index,
    noise_matrix = comparison_noise_matrix,
    num_components = comparison_num_components
  )
)

median_summaries <- lapply(
  median_cases,
  smear_summary,
  radius = comparison_radius,
  threshold = comparison_threshold
)
stopifnot(all(vapply(median_summaries, function(x) x$max_ind == x$signal_ind, logical(1))))

smear_summary_table <- do.call(rbind, lapply(names(smear_comparisons), function(method_name) {
  out <- smear_three_point_summary(smear_comparisons[[method_name]])
  out$method <- method_name
  out
}))
smear_summary_table <- smear_summary_table[
  c("method", "case", smear_columns)
]

dt_table(
  smear_summary_table,
  caption = "Smear comparison for CSSA / ESPRIT projections",
  page_length = 9L
)
```

```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=4}
old_par <- par(mfrow = c(1, 3), mar = c(4, 4, 3, 1))

for (method_name in names(median_cases)) {
  plot_smear_case(
    median_cases[[method_name]],
    median_summaries[[method_name]],
    method_name
  )
}

par(old_par)
```

```{r}
reconstruction_ht_a <- 2
reconstruction_ht_b <- -1
reconstruction_ht_clean <- make_line_matrix(
  n_row = 100L,
  n_col = 100L,
  a = reconstruction_ht_a,
  b = reconstruction_ht_b
)
reconstruction_ht_sigma <- 0.2
reconstruction_ht_n_rep <- 100L
reconstruction_ht_methods <- data.frame(
  method = c("cssa", "classic_esprit", "corrected_esprit"),
  label = c(
    "Basic CSSA",
    "CSSA + ESPRIT (no correction)",
    "CSSA + ESPRIT (corrected)"
  ),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

set.seed(2026)
reconstruction_ht_samples <- do.call(
  rbind,
  lapply(seq_len(reconstruction_ht_n_rep), function(rep_i) {
    noisy <- add.noise(reconstruction_ht_clean, sigma = reconstruction_ht_sigma)
    rows <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(reconstruction_ht_methods)), function(method_i) {
      out <- reconstruction_ht_error_once(
        method = reconstruction_ht_methods$method[method_i],
        label = reconstruction_ht_methods$label[method_i],
        noisy = noisy,
        a = reconstruction_ht_a,
        b = reconstruction_ht_b
      )
      out$rep <- rep_i
      out
    })
    do.call(rbind, rows)
  })
)

reconstruction_ht_errors <- aggregate(
  cbind(rho_mse, theta_mse, active_pixels) ~ method,
  data = reconstruction_ht_samples,
  FUN = mean
)
reconstruction_ht_errors$n_rep <- reconstruction_ht_n_rep
reconstruction_ht_errors <- reconstruction_ht_errors[
  match(reconstruction_ht_methods$label, reconstruction_ht_errors$method),
]
rownames(reconstruction_ht_errors) <- NULL
names(reconstruction_ht_errors)[names(reconstruction_ht_errors) == "rho_mse"] <- "mean_rho_mse"
names(reconstruction_ht_errors)[names(reconstruction_ht_errors) == "theta_mse"] <- "mean_theta_mse"
names(reconstruction_ht_errors)[names(reconstruction_ht_errors) == "active_pixels"] <- "mean_active_pixels"

dt_table(
  reconstruction_ht_errors,
  caption = "HT errors for CSSA / ESPRIT reconstruction comparison",
  page_length = 3L
)
```
